@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 accessibility check (I-17B mobile UI verification).
carrier: React Native / platform tree metadata via Detox synchronized capture, Maestro artifacts, or app-exposed test/debug accessibility snapshots

rules.description: interactive controls expose an accessible name/label via RN/platform tree metadata
disabled/pressed/selected state represented in deterministic attributes where the tree exposes them
touch targets meet the configured minimum where geometry metadata is available

pending_live_rule: When a required mobile a11y rule cannot be observed through a real RN/platform tree/provider (no device), that mobile a11y proof is pending-live/BLOCKED — screenshots alone do not close mobile accessibility (DL-13).
advisory_boundary: subjective a11y opinion not backed by deterministic tree/role/name/state evidence is advisory-only.
